mapper.select: select distinct m.menu_id, m.menu_name, m.parent_id, m.order_num, m.path, m.component, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.visible, m.status, m.perms, m.icon from sys_menu m inner join sys_role_menu rm on rm.menu_id = m.menu_id inner join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = rm.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and m.visible = '0' and m.status = '0' order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.perms from sys_menu m inner join sys_role_menu rm on rm.menu_id = m.menu_id inner join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = rm.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and m.status = '0' and m.perms is not null and m.perms != ''
